heading: Cadets: appointment by the President
label: 7441a Cadets: appointment by the President
text: Cadets at the Academy shall be appointed by the President alone. An appointment is conditional until the cadet is admitted.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 4341a of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub.
